name: Rachel  Simmons
ai_summary: Rachel Simmons is a 21-year-old Arizona resident with 4+ years of experience working with children ages infants to 12, including special needs. She's available part-time (evenings and weekends) and demonstrates calm conflict resolution by prioritizing student safety, communicating with parents, and close supervision.
